argument_quality.description: Clarity, depth and persuasiveness of the arguments presented.

evidence_quality.description: Relevance and accuracy of cited evidence; penalise uncited or unsupported factual claims.

rebuttal_effectiveness.description: How directly and convincingly the participant addressed the opponent's specific points.

logical_consistency.description: Absence of contradictions and logical fallacies across all statements.

topic_relevance.description: How closely the statements stay focused on the motion.

rule_compliance.description: Adherence to the debate format rules, e.g. no new evidence introduced in closing statements.
